consentItems.title: Alert and campaign consent
consentItems.summary: Users should eventually control whether they receive market alerts, newsletters, onboarding guidance, recovery nudges, and promotional upgrades by channel and purpose.

consentItems.title: Portfolio-sensitive workflows
consentItems.summary: Portfolio imports, broker sync prompts, exception reviews, and trust-recovery journeys should respect higher-sensitivity consent and clearer user confirmation.

consentItems.title: Lifecycle journey eligibility
consentItems.summary: Onboarding, upgrade, churn-recovery, and webinar/course journeys should later check consent scope before users are placed into automated sequences.

consentItems.title: Operator-safe consent rules
consentItems.summary: Operators should be able to configure journey eligibility and messaging rules without bypassing consent-state protections.

consentRules: Consent should be purpose-aware, channel-aware, and easy to explain to the user.
Growth automation must follow consent state rather than assuming silent eligibility.
Sensitive portfolio and billing flows should always bias toward explicit confirmation over aggressive automation.
